name: Main St Golf
about: Main St Golf is a premier golf simulator venue offering an exclusive golfing experience. It is equipped with a new 14' impact screen and the latest Trackman IO launch monitor, providing access to hundreds of virtual golf courses and games for all ages and skill levels. The facility features a large private bay with luxury amenities including two 75' flat screen TVs, two fireplaces, a custom bar with a built-in vending machine, and complimentary water. The venue is designed for both skill improvement and recreational play, offering a private and comfortable environment for groups up to 8 guests.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Trackman IO technology provides accurate and professional-grade tracking
Complete privacy in a luxurious bay with TVs, fireplaces, and a custom bar
24/7 online booking for maximum flexibility and convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Built-in vending machine available in the bay
Not explicitly mentioned; BYOB policy is not stated

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether they provide rental clubs. It is recommended to bring your own clubs unless contacted otherwise after booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a custom bar with a built-in vending machine. BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy is not mentioned, so alcohol may need to be purchased on-site or is not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole round. Booking is available on an hourly basis, so timing will depend on the group's pace and the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Main St Golf is suitable for all ages and skill levels, with the ability to accommodate up to 8 guests comfortably. The private and engaging environment makes it a family-friendly option.
